channel.title: The Economic Edge: Master Your Wealth

item.title: Britain has crushed immigration, and harmed itself
item.description: "Explore the unintended consequences of the UK's immigration policies in our thought-provoking podcast, 'Britain Has Crushed Immigration, and Harmed Itself'. Dive into the human and economic impacts of a restrictive approach to immigration and discover the potential long-term effects on the nation's future."
